title: Graduate School of Education - Project/Thesis Writing Guide
content:
Graduate School of Education - Project/Thesis Writing Guide

Graduate Education Institute students must prepare their theses and projects in accordance with the Thesis Writing Guide. In writing their theses, they should work on Template 1 and Template 2 in line with the guide, or prepare their projects/theses in conformity with these templates. The templates have been prepared to help students understand how the thesis/project should be structured and to provide them with a document from which they can begin writing.

Istanbul Esenyurt Unıversıty Graduate Educatıon Instıtute Thesıs Wrıtıng Guıde
